items.title: 100-days-of-ai
items.summary: Take the 100 Days of AI challenge - learn one AI concept a day, from machine learning basics to AI agents in production, in 100 days.
items.summary_cn: 参加100天的人工智能挑战-在100天内每天学习一个人工智能概念，从机器学习基础知识到生产中的人工智能代理。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: Zer0Fit
items.summary: Zero-shot forecasting, tabular classification, and regression via MCP — exposes Google TimesFM 2.5 and TabFM v1.0.0 to AI assistants. Just attach a CSV and describe what you want to predict.
items.summary_cn: 零点预测、表格分类和通过MCP进行回归—将Google TimesFM 2.5和TabFM v1.0.0暴露给AI助手。只需附上CSV文件并描述您想要预测的内容。
items.comment: AI 领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。

items.title: PHINN-EEG: Topological Time-Series Analysis of Dream-State EEG -- Dynamic Betti Curves for Dream Content Classification and Topology-Conditioned Neural Signal Synthesis
items.title_cn: PHINN-EEG ：梦境脑电图的拓扑时间序列分析--梦境内容分类和拓扑条件神经信号合成的动态Betti曲线
items.summary: Current electroencephalography (EEG)-based dream detection relies on power spectral density (PSD) and statistical moment features, achieving a state-of-the-art area under the receiver operating characteristic curve (AUC) of approximately 0.70 on the DREAM database (Wong et al., 2025, Nature Communic...
items.summary_cn: 当前基于脑电图（ EEG ）的梦境检测依赖于功率谱密度（ PSD ）和统计力矩特征，在梦境数据库上实现了接收器工作特性曲线（ AUC ）下约0.70的最先进面积（ Wong et al., 2025, Nature Communic...
items.comment: 政策收紧，大厂合规团队又要扩编了，创新空间还剩多少？

items.title: Scalable Visual Pretraining for Language Intelligence
items.title_cn: 语言智力的可扩展视觉预训练
items.summary: The rapid progress of large foundation models has been driven predominantly by pretraining on large-scale text corpora. However, many forms of knowledge are conveyed through visual representations, where figures, typeset equations, and page layouts carry rich information that cannot be faithfully or...
items.summary_cn: 大型基础模型的快速发展主要是由于对大规模文本语料库的预训练。然而，许多形式的知识是通过视觉表示来传达的，其中图形、排版方程和页面布局携带着丰富的信息，这些信息不能忠实地或...
items.comment: 新模型发布，效果先观望，按 token 计费的玩法，用得起吗？

items.title: Evolution of Accuracy and Visual-Cognitive Errors in a Decade of Vision-Language AI Models
items.title_cn: 十年视觉语言人工智能模型的准确性和视觉认知错误的演变
items.summary: Vision language models (VLMs) have made remarkable progress in visual reasoning during the last decade. Most evaluations have used simple scenes (MS-COCO) that do not showcase complex human interactions or behaviors, only a handful of non-curated human descriptions as a benchmark, and have not focus...
items.summary_cn: 视觉语言模型（ VLM ）在过去十年中在视觉推理方面取得了显着进展。大多数评估都使用了简单的场景（ MS-COCO ） ，这些场景没有展示复杂的人类互动或行为，只有少数未经精确描述的人类描述作为基准，并且没有重点...
items.comment: AI 模型迭代快得飞起，有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。

items.title: TechCrunch Mobility: A robotaxi ultimatum
items.title_cn: TechCrunch Mobility ：机器人出租车的最后通牒
items.summary: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.
items.summary_cn: 欢迎回到TechCrunch Mobility ，这是您未来交通的枢纽，现在，人工智能比以往任何时候都更能发挥作用。
items.comment: 新趋势值得注意，别盲目跟风，适合自己的才是最好的。

items.title: Reed Jobs would rather talk about curing cancer than his last name
items.title_cn: 里德·乔布斯宁愿谈论治愈癌症，也不愿谈论他的姓氏
items.summary: When we last sat down with Jobs at TechCrunch Disrupt nearly three years ago, his firm Yosemite was brand new and biotech was still reeling from its post-pandemic crash. Now, the venture outfit has a team of 17; a cluster of blockbuster drugs are all losing patent protection in roughly the same window, creating all kinds of new opportunities; and AI has gone from a curiosity to, in Jobs's words, a huge part of what Yosemite does. "I didn't expect Yosemite to be moving this fast," he said.
items.summary_cn: 近三年前，当我们最后一次在TechCrunch Disrupt与乔布斯会面时，他的公司Yosemite是全新的，生物技术仍在因疫情后的崩溃而挣扎。现在，这家风险投资公司拥有一支17人的团队；一组重磅药物都在大致相同的时间窗口内失去了专利保护，创造了各种新的机会；用乔布斯的话来说，人工智能已经从好奇心变成了优胜美地的很大一部分。“我没想到优胜美地会这么快，”他说。
items.comment: 开源项目值得支持，文档和社区活跃度比 star 数更重要。

items.title: OpenAI bets on families as ChatGPT goes deeper into households
items.title_cn: 随着ChatGPT深入家庭， OpenAI押注家庭
items.summary: ChatGPT is hiring a dedicated product manager to build experiences for families, caregivers, and older adults, according to a job posting.
items.summary_cn: 根据招聘启事， ChatGPT正在聘请专门的产品经理，为家庭、护理人员和老年人打造体验。
items.comment: AI 模型迭代快得飞起，有几个真正解决了实际问题？等落地案例。
